categories.description: Sent to tenant admins + owners when a new Branch is provisioned. Includes the branch name, organization, region, and a link to the branch settings.

Sent when a Branch transitions to closed status. Recipients are: tenant admins + owners AND every Staff / Coach / Reception User currently assigned to the Branch. Closure affects operational scheduling — cannot be opted out of.

Sent to members with active memberships referencing the Branch when opening_hours changes (or the branch is paused / resumed, since those effectively change availability). Opt-in — many members prefer to check the current hours on-demand rather than receive a mail per edit.
